name: Angela Donahue
feedback: Rose is very professional and knowledgeable, she has been preparing my taxes for 2 years. Rose has exceed all my expectations. She is always available to answer my questions. I highly recommend Rose.

name: Maureen Roxberry
feedback: Amazing accounting services for salon owners, she knows our business and that's important to me! Thank you for all of your help, and info!

name: Aaron Ray Koepsel
feedback: Rose is completely the go to when it comes to QuickBooks, tax/financial advice! She made me feel way more confident when it came to book keeping!

name: Ashanti Phelps
feedback: Rose was such a joy to work with! She was extremely helpful in walking me through the steps needed to cleaning up some inventory issues in QuickBooks. I will definitely be using her again in the future!

name: Denise Winek RN
feedback: Rose has been a member of my data/accounting team now since January 2021. I learned right away that's she's highly competent in her field which I need badly in my business. She's also an incredible educator and communicator. She responds almost immediately to my questions and I learned right away that I could trust her with my accounts. I am thrilled to have her and highly recommend her services.
